title: stevia lilloi
intro: Stevia lilloi, also known as the Paraguayan sweetleaf, is a plant species within the Stevia genus that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Stevia lilloi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
